sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Galdona awng un, gal naizo en un!
Topa dialkhai un sang takin;
Galdal silh unla, kiptak
ding unla,
Lai Siangtho’ hilhna, na siksan un.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khai leh, ding un, dial kim
hong kikhawm un,
Limtak, kiging, na kihilh sawn un;
Kuan un! Mainawt, Hosana kiko un,
Khris
in hong makaih hi galkap hon.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Eima lammah in zo ding thei khol in,
Galte ngap
thawh-in i kuan hi;
I lum le i dial ni ah tezialzial,
Thuman in thukhual lel ngeilo
hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mi khempeuh Pasian hehpihna hong pia’n,
Ko a neu a lian hong huh
in;
Galzawh cianginah Nangma maitang ah,
Hong suak nung zawhna lukhu khu in.
